text.tspan: Nia was referred to a community outpatient clinic after
experiencing domestic violence at home. She and her mother,
Denise, move through consent, assessment, active TF-CBT
treatment, and long-term follow-up — entirely on paper.
Feel safe enough to eventually share her story
Understand what happens to her private information
See her own progress, not just be assessed
Dashed curve = current, unresolved state · Emoji marks Nia's felt emotion at each phase
